title: GATE-4-FIX-V2 inbox anchor patch
objective:
Run script:
"""
NL = "\n"
p = Path('governance/deno_webhook.js')
text = p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
text = text.replace('Версия: v4.9 | BEM-487', 'Версия: v4.10 | GATE-4-FIX-V2')
text = text.replace('version: "4.9"', 'version: "4.10"')
start = text.find('const curatorComment = `@curator')
end = text.find('return new Response("OK");', start)
patched = False
if start >= 0 and end >= 0:
    new_block = 'const inboxPath = "governance/telegram/inbox.jsonl";\n const inboxFd = await getFileContents(pat, inboxPath);\n let inboxRaw = "";\n const inboxSha = inboxFd?.sha;\n if (inboxFd?.content) { inboxRaw = decodeURIComponent(escape(atob(inboxFd.content.replace(/\\n/g, "")))); }\n const inboxRecord = { ts: new Date().toISOString(), type: "OPERATOR_TO_CURATOR", source: "telegram", dedupe_key: dedupeKey, chat_id: chatId, message_id: messageId, text };\n const inboxNext = inboxRaw + JSON.stringify(inboxRecord) + "\\n";\n const status = await updateFileContents(pat, inboxPath, inboxNext, `TELEGRAM-INBOX: append ${dedupeKey}`, inboxSha);\n if (status === 200 || status === 201) { await sendTelegram(token, chatId, `📨 *${now} UA* | Записано в inbox:\\n_${text.slice(0, 100)}_`); }\n else { await sendTelegram(token, chatId, `❌ *${now} UA* | Inbox write error (HTTP ${status})`); }\n '
    text = text[:start] + new_block + text[end:]
    p.write_text(text, encoding='utf-8')
    changed_files.append(str(p))
    patched = True
inbox = Path('governance/telegram/inbox.jsonl')
inbox.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
if not inbox.exists():
    inbox.write_text('', encoding='utf-8')
    changed_files.append(str(inbox))
queue_path = Path('governance/roadmap/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json')
queue = json.loads(queue_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8')) if queue_path.exists() else {'version': 2, 'tasks': []}
if not any(t.get('id') == 'GATE-4-FIX-V2' for t in queue.get('tasks', [])):
    queue.setdefault('tasks', []).append({'id': 'GATE-4-FIX-V2', 'title': 'Telegram webhook writes to inbox.jsonl instead of GitHub issue comments', 'status': 'DONE_PENDING_SHA_RECORD' if patched else 'BLOCKED', 'touch_workflows': False})
for task in queue.get('tasks', []):
    if task.get('id') == 'GATE-4-FIX-V2':
        task['status'] = 'DONE_PENDING_SHA_RECORD' if patched else 'BLOCKED'
        task['changed'] = ['governance/deno_webhook.js', 'governance/telegram/inbox.jsonl'] if patched else []
        task['criteria'] = 'Telegram POST handler appends JSONL to governance/telegram/inbox.jsonl using updateFileContents and no longer calls postGitHubComment for operator messages'
queue['updated_at'] = '2026-06-04T16:22:00Z'
queue['queue_state'] = 'GATE4_FIX_V2_PENDING_SHA_RECORD' if patched else 'BLOCKED_ON_ANCHOR_PATCH'
queue['next_action'] = 'record GATE-4-FIX-V2 result, then deploy/test Telegram receipt' if patched else 'repair deno_webhook telegram handler anchors'
queue_path.write_text(json.dumps(queue, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + NL, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(queue_path))
state = Path('governance/state/GATE4_FIX_V2_TELEGRAM_INBOX_PATCH.json')
state.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
state.write_text(json.dumps({'id':'GATE-4-FIX-V2','trace_id':'gate4_fix_v2_telegram_inbox_patch_anchor','status':'completed' if patched else 'blocked','release_pass':False,'patched':patched,'anchor_start':start,'anchor_end':end,'change':'Telegram webhook appends operator messages to governance/telegram/inbox.jsonl via updateFileContents instead of GitHub issue comments' if patched else 'anchor patch failed','workflow_files_touched':False,'next':'record result and test Telegram receipt after Deno deploy' if patched else 'repair anchors'}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + NL, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(state))
report = Path('governance/reports/GATE4_FIX_V2_TELEGRAM_INBOX_PATCH.md')
report.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
report.write_text('# GATE-4-FIX-V2 | Telegram inbox file patch' + NL + 'Status: ' + ('completed' if patched else 'blocked') + NL + 'Date: 2026-06-04' + NL + NL + ('Telegram POST handler now writes operator messages to `governance/telegram/inbox.jsonl` through `updateFileContents` instead of posting GitHub issue comments.' if patched else 'Patch anchors were not found.') + NL + NL + 'Workflow lock respected. No `.github/workflows/*.yml` files touched.' + NL, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(report))
"""No issue comments.
